project.component: { "keyToString": { "Android App.app.activitylifecycle.executor": "Run", "Android App.app.dialog.executor": "Run", "Android App.app.executor": "Run", "Android App.app.intentfilter.executor": "Run", "Android App.app.multiactivity.executor": "Run", "Android App.app.notificationapp.executor": "Run", "Android App.app.toastapp.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "cf.first.check.clang-format": "false", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "com.google.services.firebase.aqiPopupShown": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "project.structure.last.edited": "Modules", "project.structure.proportion": "0.17", "project.structure.side.proportion": "0.2", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "settings.sync" } }
